speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.summary: Powell said the FOMC held the policy rate steady at 3.5% to 3.75% and emphasized that the current stance is appropriate while the Fed remains attentive to both employment and inflation risks.

speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.summary: Powell said the FOMC left rates unchanged, described policy as appropriately positioned, and noted the committee had already moved rates within a range of plausible neutral estimates.

speeches.name: Jerome Powell
speeches.summary: Powell announced a 25 bp rate cut and said the decision reflected the balance of risks to employment and inflation.
